title: T-042 — Forecast Upload screen and manual forecast management UI
prompt:
# T-042 — Forecast Upload screen and manual forecast management UI

PRD: `docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md` §8.1 SCR-07-03, §17.1 PLE forecast coverage, §15.4 V-SCHED-09.
UX/prototype refs are listed in `pipeline_inputs.scope_files`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Build the first-class forecast management surface for P1 manual demand inputs and P2-gated Prophet display.

## Implementation contract
Server-load forecast rows from T-020, post uploads through T-019, and preserve prototype layout/interaction parity including upload/preview stages, source badges, and stale/health gated card. Use i18n keys for hardcoded strings.

ACP shape reminder: keep this task as one atomic implementation. Do not add ACP-owned fields. Keep local dependencies in `dependencies`; cross-module contracts in `cross_module_dependencies` are blockers/inputs, not ACP local task IDs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement /scheduler/forecasts with manual CSV upload modal, forecast grid, source filters, validation preview, and P2 Prophet gated health card.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use prototype pext_forecasts_screen and forecast_upload_modal. P1 manual CSV is active; Prophet chart/health is feature-gated P2. D365 sales history is optional P2 input only and never a scheduler source of truth in P1.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Forecast-driven PO generation remains Planning-owned and reviewer-approved.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: Optional P2 sales history pull; D365 is not P1 source of truth.

acceptance_criteria: Given /scheduler/forecasts renders, then it has prototype parity with pext_forecasts_screen/forecast_upload_modal including filters, grid, modal stages and gated Prophet card.
Given a CSV is selected, then forecast_upload_modal validates product_code/week_iso/qty_kg and shows row errors for V-SCHED-09 before commit.
Given scheduler.prophet.enabled=false, then Prophet confidence bands/health controls are hidden or locked, while manual forecast flows remain usable.
test_strategy: RED RTL tests for filters, modal validation, P2 feature gate.
Run pnpm --filter web test scheduler/ForecastUploadModal scheduler/forecasts-page.
risk_red_lines: Do not make D365 mandatory for P1 forecasts.
Do not bypass server-side CSV validation.
Do not hardcode FA nomenclature; use FG/product_code labels.
